hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -z "$f" ]; then echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then python -m py_compile "$f" 2>&1 && echo '{"suppressOutput": true}' || echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Python syntax error in $f\"}"; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Rust file changed — run cargo check when done"}'; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(jsx?|tsx?)$'; then cd /home/ulrich/Documents/Projects/jarvis/shells/web/frontend 2>/dev/null && npx eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern "$f" 2>&1 | head -5 && echo '{"suppressOutput": true}' || echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"ESLint issues in $f\"}"; else echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'; fi; }

mkdir -p ~/.jarvis/logs && jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read -r cmd; if [ -n "$cmd" ]; then printf '%s | %s\n' "$(date -Iseconds)" "$cmd" >> ~/.jarvis/logs/bash_audit.log; fi; echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q '/.git/'; then echo '{"decision": "reject", "reason": "Refusing to modify files inside .git/ directory"}'; elif [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key)$'; then echo '{"decision": "reject", "reason": "Refusing to modify secrets/credentials files"}'; else echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; fi; }
